backend/main.mo: Motoko canister handling user profiles, featured properties, waitlist entries, and listings with access-controlled admin/user operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two homepage-related features, their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like text summarizing multiple frontend files, their purpose, and design characteristics.
frontend/docs/design-spec-urbanet.md: Empty design spec Markdown file placeholder for Urbanet styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/styles defining OKLCH color variables, dark mode tokens, and global border/background rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML app entry with font imports and root mounting element for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main router configuration mapping all pages and layout using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: UI screen shown when a user lacks admin permission, offering navigation back home.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Admin login prompt using Internet Identity with loading state and login handler.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminWaitl: Admin table fetching, searching, sorting, and displaying waitlist entries with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ListingAuth: Gate component that checks Internet Identity login state, shows loading or login prompt, and renders children when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/listings/Listing: Form for creating property listings with validation, photo upload conversion, and submit handling via createListing mutation.
frontend/src/components/listings/PhotoPi: Photo upload widget that validates image types/sizes, shows previews, and allows removing selected images.
frontend/src/components/properties/Prope: Displays a property preview card with image, key stats, and a button navigating to the property details page.
Footer with branding, navigation links, contact info, and copyright text.
Responsive header with navigation links, admin check, mobile menu toggling, and CTA button.
Page layout wrapper including site header, main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/content/marketingCopy.ts: Defines static marketing copy for the home, property details, how‑it‑works, and about pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps backend actor calls in React Query hooks for fetching properties, waitlist data, listings, and admin checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS layers and custom theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page using marketing copy, showing mission, approach, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Displays the admin dashboard with authentication checks, showing waitlist data for authorized admins.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Page for authenticated users to create a property listing, showing a form and a success state with the created listing ID.
frontend/src/pages/DesignMockupsPage.tsx: Empty placeholder page with no implemented UI or logic.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Homepage displaying a marketing hero section and featured properties loaded via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Static marketing page explaining how the platform works using card-based content sections.
frontend/src/pages/InvestPage.tsx: Investor-focused marketing page with a hero section, benefits, and process steps for investing.
frontend/src/pages/JoinEarlyAccessPage.t: Form page allowing users to join a waitlist, with submission handling and a success message view.
frontend/src/pages/LegalCompliancePage.t: Page presenting legal and compliance information in an accordion layout.
frontend/src/pages/ListingPage.tsx: Marketing page for property owners describing listing benefits and process with navigation to create a listing.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Renders a listings management page showing loading, error, empty, and populated states, with navigation to create new listings. Uses authentication gating and fetches the user's listings via hooks.
frontend/src/pages/PropertiesPage.tsx: Displays featured investment properties with loading, grid, and empty states, setting the page title and rendering PropertyCard components.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyDetailsPage.t: Shows detailed information for a single property, including loading and error handling, and updates the document title dynamically.
frontend/src/pages/RentPage.tsx: Presents marketing content for renters with hero, benefits, features, and CTA sections sourced from rentCopy.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL and sessionStorage parameters, including support for hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and animations with custom design tokens.
project_state.json: Metadata file describing project requirements, features, and state for a home page with List, Rent, and Invest options.
